title: Cute paintings
description: This resource pack replaces all vanilla paintings with custom ones. It offers cute and cozy artwork that will make your Minecraft home feel even warmer.💮
body:
This resource pack completely replaces the standard vanilla paintings with custom, original illustrations filled with warmth, comfort, and a touch of magic. It’s time to decorate your walls with something truly lovely!

![A painting of a glowing octopus in a warm and cozy interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64cd482f58e942463f6940ce26a4b0b37f369b6f.png)

## What’s inside?

Beloved Mobs: Square bees nesting in flowers, lounging cats, sleepy foxes, and friendly axolotls.

Nature Aesthetics: Delicate floral motifs, cozy landscapes, and soft pastel tones.

Pixel-Art Magic: Each painting perfectly blends into the game’s core style while adding a unique, personal touch to your interior.

It’s an absolute match for fans of aesthetic builds, cottagecore, or anyone who just wants to make their survival world a little bit sweeter. Every single detail is designed to bring a smile to your face every time you return to your base after a long mining trip. ✨
